ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "dominant_foot" TEXT /* Dominant foot of the player */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Full name of the club */,
  "club_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the club (e.g., WB, ADEL) */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the club */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "club_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the club's logo */,
  "club_colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the club */,
  "club_website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "club_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the club */,
  "club_president" TEXT /* Name of the club's president */,
  "club_coach" TEXT /* Name of the club's current coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_club_history" (
  "player_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-club combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the player played for the club */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played for the club */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing for the club */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player ended playing for the club */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player for the club during the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player for the club during the season */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the season */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach during the player's time at the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_club_history_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_club_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_club_history_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the season the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the game */,
  "crowd_favorites" TEXT /* Team that the crowd favored */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoff, grand final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "kicks" REAL /* Number of kicks by the player in the game */,
  "handballs" REAL /* Number of handballs by the player in the game */,
  "marks" REAL /* Number of marks by the player in the game */,
  "goals" REAL /* Number of goals by the player in the game */,
  "behinds" REAL /* Number of behinds by the player in the game */,
  "goal_assists" REAL /* Number of goal assists by the player in the game */,
  "time_on_ground" REAL /* Time on ground by the player in the game in minutes */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player in the game */,
  "hitouts" INTEGER /* Number of hitouts by the player in the game */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances by the player in the game */,
  "inside_50s" INTEGER /* Number of inside 50s by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds_50" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds 50 by the player in the game */,
  "frees_for" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks the player received */,
  "frees_against" INTEGER /* Number of free kicks the player conceded */,
  "disposals" INTEGER /* Total disposals (kicks + handballs) by the player in the game */,
  "disposal_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of disposals (percentage of successful disposals) */,
  "goals_assists_total" INTEGER /* Total assists that led to goals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "grand_final_date" TEXT /* Date of the grand final */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of the position (e.g., attacking, defensive, midfield) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the position */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the player played in the position */,
  "position_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency in the position (percentage of successful plays) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, search, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
